mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_dp_msd WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY reba_score DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_dp_msd WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_dp_msd WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_dp_msd WHERE deleted = 0 AND risk_level = #{riskLevel}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_dp_msd (worker_name, department, job_title, task_name, task_category, reba_score, owas_score, risk_level, affected_body_parts, symptoms, assessment_date, assessor, status, action_taken, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{workerName}, #{department,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{jobTitle,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{taskName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{taskCategory,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{rebaScore,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{owasScore,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{riskLevel,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{affectedBodyParts,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{symptoms,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{assessmentDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{assessor,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{actionTaken,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, 0, #{createdByUserId}, #{createdByName}, #{createdByTeam}, #{createdByPosition}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_dp_msd SET worker_name = #{workerName}, department = #{department,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, job_title = #{jobTitle,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, task_name = #{taskName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, task_category = #{taskCategory,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, reba_score = #{rebaScore,jdbcType=INTEGER}, owas_score = #{owasScore,jdbcType=INTEGER}, risk_level = #{riskLevel,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, affected_body_parts = #{affectedBodyParts,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, symptoms = #{symptoms,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, assessment_date = #{assessmentDate,jdbcType=DATE}, assessor = #{assessor,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, action_taken = #{actionTaken,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, notes = #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_dp_msd SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
